data.information:
An evacuation shelter is open at Andrews Hall on the Chadron State College campus.

The shelter is providing:

  • Two meals per day

  • Water and snacks

  • A safe place to stay and access support services

Update from South Fork Fire Nebraska page on Facebook.

This shelter is being operated by Chadron State College with support from the American Red Cross per the Nebraska Red Cross-Nebraska Iowa Region.

child_geo_events.address: 708 N Division St, Pinehurst, ID 83850, USA
child_geo_events.name: Real Life Ministries Silver Valley

data.information:
Real Life Church in Pinehurst located at 708 N Division St, Pinehurst, ID is open and available as a shelter for anyone in need of a safe place to stay, per Shoshone County Sheriff's Office on Facebook.

The church also has a field located behind the facility that can be used to shelter horses and other large animals if needed.

Residents needing a place to store trailers, RVs, horse trailers, or other large vehicles due to the evacuation order may utilize Metro Towing located at 709 Main St, Smelterville, ID, per Shoshone County Sheriff's Office on Facebook.
